name: neurogpt-optimization
description: Optimize large-scale problems using brain-inspired approaches without explicit neural networks
paperTitle: NeuroGPT - Brain-Inspired Neural Network-Free Framework for Large-Scale Optimization
content:
## NeuroGPT

### Core Concept

Optimize large-scale problems using brain-inspired approaches without explicit neural networks

### Implementation

Key implementation aspects:
1. Data preparation and preprocessing
2. Model architecture design
3. Training procedure
4. Evaluation and validation

This skill enables Optimize large-scale problems using brain-inspired approaches without explicit neural networks.

### When to Use

- Problem domain matches technique scope
- Required computational resources available
- Evaluation criteria well-defined

### When NOT to Use

- Limited data availability
- Tight latency requirements
- Domain significantly different
